title: Entrance window test protocol for S3-LEB
author: Anjali Ajayakumar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A protocol developed for testing the efficiency of the gas cell entrance windows for S3-LEB, discribing preliminary test bench,the method followed for the tests and the test bench under progress for advanced tests.
steps_raw: A protocol developed for testing the efficiency of the gas cell entrance windows for S3-LEB, discribing preliminary test bench,the method followed for the tests and the test bench under progress for advanced tests.
